t: NICE NG158 — diagnosis and intervention in children and adolescents.
CBCL (Child Behavior Checklist), TRF (Teacher Report Form).
The Inventory of Callous-Unemotional Traits — for psychopathic traits.
Explosive type; absence of persistent antisocial pattern.
MST — Multisystemic Therapy (Henggeler S.W.) — encompassing family, peer, school, community;
Antipsychotic (risperidone) — off-label in severe aggression, with caution; no FDA approval (specific for childhood aggression).
"Scared Straight" and similar programs are contraindicated.
— Cochrane (Petrosino A. 2013) — these programs antisocial behavior
Boot camp type "tough love" programs — no evidence, harmful.
Group program for parents of children aged 3–8 years; 14–22 sessions.
Home-based multisystem intervention for adolescents; evidence base strong for severe behavioral disturbances.
— Structured fostering program; for severe case.
With childhood-type and psychopathic traits — risk of ASPD in adulthood ~40–50%.
Early parent training and multisystem intervention significantly improve outcomes.
Myth 1: "Harsh punishment/discipline is the most effective intervention"
Harsh punishment strengthens antisocial behavior; positive parenting training is evidenced.
Petrosino A. Cochrane 2013 — Scared Straight INCREASES ANTISOCIAL behavior by 28%; caution; sometimes presented as "effective" in media, but meta-analysis negative.
Myth 3: "Conduct disorder inevitably turns into ASPD"
Approximately 50% of cases with adolescent-onset type remit; childhood-onset type and psychopathic traits indicate a poor prognosis.
In comorbid ADHD, stimulants REDUCE aggression; use without reservation.
Myth 5: "Boot camp or military environment cures severe CD"
No evidence; some studies show counter-effect efficacy.
parent training and psychosocial approaches first-line; risperidone off-label in severe refractory cases.
NICE NG158. Antisocial behaviour and conduct disorders in children and young people: recognition and management. 2017.
Steiner H., Remsing L. AACAP Practice Parameter for the Assessment and Treatment of Conduct Disorder. J Am Acad Child Adolesc Psychiatry 2007;46(1):126–141.
Petrosino A. et al. "Scared Straight" and other juvenile awareness programs for preventing juvenile delinquency. Cochrane Database Syst Rev 2013;(4):CD002796.
Henggeler S.W. Multisystemic Therapy. Guilford Press; 1998.
